summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed on the public preview after premium UI polish. Core dashboard-to-builder workflows and requested builder controls remain functional with no runtime/console errors observed during this run.

issues: Create starter project button label appears visually truncated/clipped at desktop width in tested state, reducing polish/readability.

action_items: Fix dashboard create-project CTA text clipping (likely by preventing flex shrink or increasing button min-width).
Optional: split oversized SectionRenderer.jsx (>700 lines) into smaller renderer modules for maintainability and safer future UI updates.
critical_code_review_comments: SectionRenderer.jsx is 900+ lines; exceeds maintainability threshold and increases regression risk for style-only changes.
Styling pass preserved core interactions (create/open/save/toggle/switch/inline edit), but CTA truncation indicates a responsive typography/layout edge case in hero form controls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Passed: dashboard load, project creation, builder load, viewport toggles, focus mode toggle, save click, sidebar tab switching, page switching, add section button flow, inline title editing. No .error-class UI errors detected in tested pages.
rca of the issue: Dashboard CTA clipping likely caused by flex row compression where input + button share width; button text does not preserve full label under available space constraints. Mitigation: add shrink-0/min-width to CTA or allow wrapping/shorter label at breakpoints.
